jasperReport.name: SolicitudCot
jasperReport.queryString:
select a.Aid, a.Cid, a.DOcantidad, a.DOlinea, a.ESidsolicitud, a.Ucodigo, a.DOcantidad, a.DOpreciou, a.DOtotal , d.EOfecha, d.EOnumero, d.EOplazo, case CMtipo when 'A' then Adescripcion when 'S' then Cdescripcion end as Descripcion, rtrim(ltrim(sn.SNidentificacion)) + ' - ' + sn.SNnombre as SNnombre, sn.SNdireccion, sn.SNtelefono, sn.SNFax, sn.SNdireccion, m.Msimbolo, m.Mnombre, em.Edescripcion from DOrdenCM a inner join EOrdenCM d on a.EOidorden=d.EOidorden
inner join SNegocios sn on d.SNcodigo = sn.SNcodigo and d.Ecodigo = sn.Ecodigo inner join Monedas m on d.Mcodigo = m.Mcodigo and d.Ecodigo = m.Ecodigo inner join Empresas em on d.Ecodigo = em.Ecodigo left outer join AClasificacion ac on a.Ecodigo = ac.Ecodigo and a.ACcodigo = ac.ACcodigo and a.ACid = ac.ACid left outer join ACategoria acat on a.Ecodigo = acat.Ecodigo and a.ACcodigo = acat.ACcodigo left outer join Articulos b on a.Aid=b.Aid and a.Ecodigo=b.Ecodigo left outer join Conceptos c on a.Cid=c.Cid and a.Ecodigo=c.Ecodigo where a.Ecodigo = $P{Ecodigo} and (d.EOfecha >= convert(datetime,$P{EOfechaI},103) and d.EOfecha <= convert(datetime,$P{EOfechaF},103) or $P{EOfechaI} = '01/01/1900' and $P{EOfechaF} = '01/01/1900') and (sn.SNcodigo between $P{SNcodigoI} and $P{SNcodigoF} or $P{SNcodigoI} = 0 or $P{SNcodigoF} = 0) and (d.EOnumero between $P{EOnumeroI} and $P{EOnumeroF} or $P{EOnumeroI} = 0 or $P{EOnumeroF} = 0)

staticText.text: Please refer to the above number in all invoices and correspondence. Favor referirse al número arriba
Consignar y enviar documentos por vía aérea a:
Fecha de Arribo en Costa Rica:
Aereo por CIA que designe la casa exportadora.

IMPORTANT INSTRUCTION: Commercial invoices must be in SPANISH and FOUR copies showing net and gross weights and SIGNED by shippers. The following legend must appear:' Declaramos bajo juramento que los precios y detalles de esta factura son verdaderos'. Two original copies of Bill of Landing but not consultar invoices needed DO NOT INSURE, we are covered under a floating policy in Costa Rica.
